CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2011 Continued To Aug-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin; Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha; CSR: M. Baldocchi #5207.

Fred Keeperman, Esq. for and with Plaintiff: Shreve & Co. Jewelers, LTD.,
Plaintiff's Witness Katherine Pham was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff: Mike Garza, and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): King Kwan for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $27,130.50
Prejudgment Interest - $10,951.88
Attorney's Fees - none requested.
Costs - $465.00
Total - $38,547.38
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Continued To Jul-01-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610
